top_findings.summary: The skill requires an environment variable KNOWLEDGE_BASE (defaulting to ~/.claude/knowledge) that is not used in any of the validation processes described. For a documentation validation tool that only needs access to the documentation root (DOCS_ROOT), requesting a separate knowledge base directory path is unnecessary and could expose unrelated sensitive knowledge base data.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requires an environment variable KNOWLEDGE_BASE (defaulting to ~/.claude/knowledge) that is not used in any of the validation processes described. For a documentation validation tool that only needs access to the documentation root (DOCS_ROOT), requesting a separate knowledge base directory path is unnecessary and could expose unrelated sensitive knowledge base data.
